info.name: LeanStock API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for LeanStock inventory management system

request.description:
Request: 01 - Login
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/login
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/login and return API response.

Request: 02 - Refresh Token
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/refresh
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/refresh and return API response.

Request: 03 - Logout
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/logout
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/logout and return API response.
Request disabled: Public registration is turned off for employee-only system. Use /auth/invite + /auth/register-invite.

Request: 05 - Request Password Reset
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/request-password-reset
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/request-password-reset and return API response.

Request: 06 - Verify Email
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/verify-email
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/verify-email and return API response.

Request: 07 - Change Password
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/change-password
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/change-password and return API response.

Request: 08 - Invite User (Admin Only)
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/invite
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/invite and return API response.

Request: 09 - Register by Invite Token
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/auth/register-invite
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/register-invite and return API response.

Request: 01 - List Products
Method: GET
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/products?limit=10&page=1
Purpose: Execute GET {{baseUrl}}/products?limit=10&page=1 and return API response.

Request: 02 - Get Product by ID
Method: GET
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}}
Purpose: Execute GET {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}} and return API response.

Request: 03 - Create Product
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/products
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/products and return API response.

Request: 04 - Update Product
Method: PUT
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}}
Purpose: Execute PUT {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}} and return API response.

Request: 05 - Delete Product
Method: DELETE
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}}
Purpose: Execute DELETE {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}} and return API response.

Request: 06 - Upload Product Image
Method: POST
Endpoint: {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}}/images
Purpose: Execute POST {{baseUrl}}/products/{{productId}}/images and return API response.
